subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-01-30
subcodes.first_line: We are hedged in from all directions. The roads of correspondence are all blocked and it is impossible to receive or send any news.
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West, @being a source of light; guidance
